name: Document grid header controls
notes: The controls bar occupies lines 971-1007 of the render() method inside the DocumentGrid class component; it is not a standalone page or route.

Client-side filtering (search text and file type) is applied in render() via filterDocuments() — no API call is made when the user types or changes the select; the full document list stays in component state.
The Refresh button is the only control in this panel that triggers an API call (GET /api/documents); the search input does NOT invoke the backend GET /api/search endpoint.
View mode (grid/list) and sort order are kept only in component state and are reset on every unmount.
